info.name: Cibus Home Assignment - Implementation Aligned Tests
info.description: Implementation-aligned API test suite with runner chain, pagination checks, happy flow, and negative scenarios.

exec: pm.test('register user A returns 201', function () { pm.expect(ok).to.eql(true); });

if (!ok) { const errors = JSON.parse(pm.collectionVariables.get('runErrors')); errors.push('01 expected 201'); pm.collectionVariables.set('runErrors', JSON.stringify(errors)); pm.collectionVariables.set('runFailed', String(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('runFailed')) + 1)); }

item.name: 22 - Negative duplicate message by same user

exec: ok = body.code === 'MESSAGE_ALREADY_EXISTS' && body.detail === 'User already posted this message';
pm.test('duplicate message returns 409 with AppError payload', function () { pm.expect(ok).to.eql(true); });

if (!ok) { const errors = JSON.parse(pm.collectionVariables.get('runErrors')); errors.push('22 expected MESSAGE_ALREADY_EXISTS'); pm.collectionVariables.set('runErrors', JSON.stringify(errors)); pm.collectionVariables.set('runFailed', String(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('runFailed')) + 1)); }

pm.execution.setNextRequest('24 - Negative delete another user message');

pm.test('delete by non-owner returns 403 AppError', function () { pm.expect(ok).to.eql(true); });

if (!ok) { const errors = JSON.parse(pm.collectionVariables.get('runErrors')); errors.push('24 expected MESSAGE_DELETE_FORBIDDEN'); pm.collectionVariables.set('runErrors', JSON.stringify(errors)); pm.collectionVariables.set('runFailed', String(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('runFailed')) + 1)); }

item.name: 34 - User messages no limit default and no next

exec: ok = Array.isArray(items) && items.length <= 20 && body.next === null && hasProtected && !hasDeleted;
pm.test('no-limit user/messages uses default and no next when exhausted', function () { pm.expect(ok).to.eql(true); });

if (!ok) { const errors = JSON.parse(pm.collectionVariables.get('runErrors')); errors.push('34 expected user/messages default limit, next=null, and only active user messages'); pm.collectionVariables.set('runErrors', JSON.stringify(errors)); pm.collectionVariables.set('runFailed', String(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('runFailed')) + 1)); }
pm.execution.setNextRequest('35 - Messages large limit and no next when exhausted');

item.name: 35 - Messages large limit and no next when exhausted

exec: pm.test('messages with high limit has no next when exhausted', function () { pm.expect(ok).to.eql(true); });

if (!ok) { const errors = JSON.parse(pm.collectionVariables.get('runErrors')); errors.push('35 expected messages next=null when fewer than requested limit'); pm.collectionVariables.set('runErrors', JSON.stringify(errors)); pm.collectionVariables.set('runFailed', String(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('runFailed')) + 1)); }

if (!ok) { const errors = JSON.parse(pm.collectionVariables.get('runErrors')); errors.push('29 expected 204 logout'); pm.collectionVariables.set('runErrors', JSON.stringify(errors)); pm.collectionVariables.set('runFailed', String(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('runFailed')) + 1)); }
pm.test('logout without token returns 401', function () { pm.expect(ok).to.eql(true); });

if (!ok) { const errors = JSON.parse(pm.collectionVariables.get('runErrors')); errors.push('30 expected 401 no-token logout'); pm.collectionVariables.set('runErrors', JSON.stringify(errors)); pm.collectionVariables.set('runFailed', String(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('runFailed')) + 1)); }
